mapper.insert: insert into accounts (store_seq, bank_name, account_number, account_name, billing_key, is_active, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountName}, #{billingKey}, 'Y', Now())
mapper.select: select * from accounts where store_seq = #{storeSeq} and is_active = 'Y' order by account_seq desc limit 4
select count(*) from accounts where store_seq = #{storeSeq} and is_active = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into auto_payment_schedule ( store_seq, partner_seq, account_seq, payment_day, is_active, start_date, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{partnerSeq}, #{accountSeq}, #{paymentDay}, 'Y', #{startDate}, Now() )

insert into payment_cards ( user_seq, store_seq, billing_key, card_company, card_number_masked, card_type, card_name, is_default, is_active, created_at) values ( #{userSeq}, #{storeSeq}, #{billingKey}, #{cardCompany}, #{cardNumberMasked}, #{cardType}, #{cardName}, 'N', 'Y', Now() )
mapper.select: SELECT card_seq AS cardSeq, user_seq AS userSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, billing_key AS billingKey, card_company AS cardCompany, card_number_masked AS cardNumberMasked, card_type AS cardType, card_name AS cardName, is_default AS isDefault, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM payment_cards WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY card_seq DESC

SELECT card_seq AS cardSeq, user_seq AS userSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, billing_key AS billingKey, card_company AS cardCompany, card_number_masked AS cardNumberMasked, card_type AS cardType, card_name AS cardName, is_default AS isDefault, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM payment_cards WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND card_seq = #{cardSeq} AND is_active = 'Y'

SELECT p.payment_seq AS paymentSeq, p.payment_id AS paymentId,
-- 결제 일시 DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS paidAt,
-- 카드사명 pc.card_company AS cardCompany,
-- 카드번호 마스킹 pc.card_number_masked AS cardNumberMasked,
-- 돈을 낸 내 매장명 payer.company_name AS payerName,
-- 돈을 받은 거래처 매장명 partner.company_name AS partnerName,
-- 결제 금액 p.total_amount AS totalAmount,
-- 결제 상태 p.status AS status FROM payments p JOIN payment_cards pc ON p.card_seq = pc.card_seq JOIN stores payer ON p.store_seq = payer.store_seq JOIN stores partner ON p.partner_seq = partner.store_seq WHERE p.store_seq = #{storeSeq}
AND DATE(p.paid_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND p.paid_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND p.paid_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND ( pc.card_company LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pc.card_number_masked LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR payer.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR partner.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY p.paid_at DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( store_seq, partner_seq, card_seq, payment_id, total_amount, status, paid_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{storeSeq}, #{partnerSeq}, #{cardSeq}, #{paymentId}, #{totalAmount}, 'PAID', NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO payment_order_map ( payment_seq, order_seq, amount, created_at ) SELECT #{paymentSeq}, o.order_seq, o.total_amount, NOW() FROM orders o WHERE o.order_seq IN
#{orderSeq}

INSERT INTO expenses ( store_seq, category_seq, expense_date, title, amount, memo, payment_method, supplier_name, ref_type, ref_seq, created_at ) SELECT buyer_store.store_seq, 1, CURDATE(), CONCAT('발주 결제 - ', o.order_no), o.total_amount, '포트원 카드 결제 자동 등록', 'card', partner_store.company_name, 'ORDER', o.order_seq, NOW() FROM orders o JOIN stores buyer_store ON buyer_store.user_seq = o.buyer_seq JOIN stores partner_store ON partner_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq WHERE buyer_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND o.order_seq IN
#{orderSeq}
mapper.select:
SELECT -- users.user_type을 화면에 보여줄 사업자 유형으로 변환 CASE WHEN u.user_type = 'PARTNER' THEN '거래처' WHEN u.user_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN '사업자' WHEN u.user_type = 'ADMIN' THEN '관리자' ELSE '-' END AS businessType,
-- stores.biz_number를 사업자번호로 사용 IFNULL(s.biz_number, '-') AS businessNumber,
-- stores.ceo_name을 대표자명으로 사용 IFNULL(s.ceo_name, '-') AS ownerName,
-- 현재 stores 테이블에는 업태/종목 컬럼이 없으므로 임시 표시 '-' AS businessItem FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE s.store_seq = #{storeSeq}

SELECT -- 이번 달 입금 완료 금액 IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(p.total_amount) FROM payments p WHERE p.partner_seq = #{storeSeq} AND p.status = 'PAID' AND DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS paidAmount,
-- 이번 달 입금 완료 건수 IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payments p WHERE p.partner_seq = #{storeSeq} AND p.status = 'PAID' AND DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') ), 0) AS paidCount,
-- 입금 예정 금액: 아직 결제되지 않았고 배송완료 전인 발주 IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o JOIN stores seller_store ON seller_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq WHERE seller_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND o.status != 'DELIVERED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) ), 0) AS scheduledAmount,
-- 입금 예정 건수 IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN stores seller_store ON seller_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq WHERE seller_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND o.status != 'DELIVERED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) ), 0) AS scheduledCount,
-- 미수금 금액: 배송완료됐지만 아직 결제되지 않은 발주 IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM orders o JOIN stores seller_store ON seller_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq WHERE seller_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) ), 0) AS unpaidAmount,
-- 미수금 건수 IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN stores seller_store ON seller_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq WHERE seller_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND o.status = 'DELIVERED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) ), 0) AS unpaidCount

SELECT -- 카드사를 입금 수단처럼 표시 IFNULL(pc.card_company, '-') AS bank,
-- 카드번호 마스킹 표시 IFNULL(pc.card_number_masked, '-') AS account,
-- 입금 금액 p.total_amount AS amount,
-- 입금일 표시 DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%c월 %e일 입금') AS date FROM payments p LEFT JOIN payment_cards pc ON p.card_seq = pc.card_seq WHERE p.partner_seq = #{storeSeq} AND p.status = 'PAID' ORDER BY p.paid_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT result.id, result.client, result.type, result.date, result.expected, result.paid, result.account, result.status FROM ( -- 입금완료 수금 이력 SELECT -- 결제 번호 p.payment_seq AS id,
-- 돈을 보낸 사업자명 IFNULL(payer.company_name, '-') AS client,
-- 돈을 보낸 회원 유형 CASE WHEN payer_user.user_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN '사업자' WHEN payer_user.user_type = 'PARTNER' THEN '거래처' ELSE '-' END AS type,
-- 실제 입금일 DATE_FORMAT(p.paid_at, '%c월 %e일') AS date,
-- 예정 금액 p.total_amount AS expected,
-- 실제 입금된 금액 p.total_amount AS paid,
-- 결제 수단 표시 CONCAT(IFNULL(pc.card_company, '-'), ' ', IFNULL(pc.card_number_masked, '-')) AS account,
-- 수금 상태 '입금완료' AS status,
-- 정렬용 날짜 p.paid_at AS sortDate FROM payments p JOIN stores payer ON p.store_seq = payer.store_seq JOIN users payer_user ON payer.user_seq = payer_user.user_seq LEFT JOIN payment_cards pc ON p.card_seq = pc.card_seq WHERE p.partner_seq = #{storeSeq} AND p.status = 'PAID'
UNION ALL
-- 입금예정 또는 미수금 수금 이력 SELECT -- 발주 번호 o.order_seq AS id,
-- 발주한 사업자명 IFNULL(buyer_store.company_name, '-') AS client,
-- 발주한 회원 유형 CASE WHEN buyer_user.user_type = 'BUSINESS' THEN '사업자' WHEN buyer_user.user_type = 'PARTNER' THEN '거래처' ELSE '-' END AS type,
-- 결제 예정일 컬럼이 없어서 발주일을 임시 표시 IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%c월 %e일'), '-') AS date,
-- 예정 금액 o.total_amount AS expected,
-- 아직 입금되지 않았으므로 0원 0 AS paid,
-- 아직 결제 전이므로 결제 수단 없음 '-' AS account,
-- 배송완료인데 미결제면 미수금, 아니면 입금예정 CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN '미수금' ELSE '입금예정' END AS status,
-- 정렬용 날짜 o.created_at AS sortDate FROM orders o JOIN stores seller_store ON seller_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq JOIN stores buyer_store ON buyer_store.user_seq = o.buyer_seq JOIN users buyer_user ON buyer_store.user_seq = buyer_user.user_seq WHERE seller_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) ) result ORDER BY result.sortDate DESC
